title: Unit 1: Mongolian Cyrillic
subtitle: Introduction, classification, writing, reading, final exam
description: Learn the Mongolian Cyrillic alphabet through letter recognition, classification, tracing, pronunciation drills, and simple word building.

title: Unit 1: Vowels (1)
subtitle: Basic and auxiliary vowels
description: Classify vowels, practice pronunciation, and build a basic vowel vocabulary.

title: Unit 2: Vowel Sounds
subtitle: Short, long, and diphthong vowels
description: Learn vowel sound types and practice distinguishing and writing them.

title: Unit 3: Vowel Harmony
subtitle: Rules, sequences, and exceptions
description: Study vowel harmony rules, sequence patterns, and common exceptions.

title: Unit 1: Verb Suffixes and Conditions
subtitle: Common endings, negation, and conditional patterns
description: Practice core verb endings, negative forms, and simple condition structures used in intermediate grammar.

title: Unit 2: Sentence and Verb Structures
subtitle: Word order, verb chains, and clause patterns
description: Build confidence with sentence order, linked verb forms, and compact clause structures.

title: Unit 3: Pronouns and Modal Words
subtitle: Reference words, modal forms, and adverbial usage
description: Study pronoun choice, modal expressions, and common adverbial words in short focused lessons.

title: Unit 4: Connectors and Final Exam
subtitle: Linking words, sentence flow, and final review
description: Use connectors to join ideas, review key patterns, and finish with a final grammar check.

title: Unit 1: Advanced Verb Forms
subtitle: Causative, passive, and directional usage
description: Study advanced verb forms that express causing, being acted on, and directional movement in compact grammar lessons.

title: Unit 2: Advanced Pronouns
subtitle: Indefinite, reflexive, and emphatic reference
description: Practice advanced pronoun choices, indefinite references, and reflexive forms used in more nuanced sentences.

title: Unit 3: Modal and Adverbial Nuance
subtitle: Nuance, stance, and degree
description: Learn how modal and adverbial words adjust certainty, intensity, and speaker attitude.

title: Unit 4: Complex Sentences and Final Exam
subtitle: Connectors, clause layering, and review
description: Build longer connected sentences with clause links, then complete a final advanced grammar assessment.

title: Unit 1: Advanced Verb and Clause Forms
subtitle: Participle-like, imperative, purpose, and condition forms
description: Study high-level verb and clause patterns including participle-like usage, commands, and purpose or condition structures.

title: Unit 2: Advanced Sentence Construction
subtitle: Complex building, clause linking, and non-finite chains
description: Practice building denser sentences through linked clauses, non-finite forms, and structured sentence patterns.

title: Unit 3: Derivational Suffixes
subtitle: Noun-forming, verb-forming, and quality-forming suffixes
description: Learn how advanced suffixes derive new nouns, verbs, and quality or state expressions.

title: Unit 4: Review and Final Assessment
subtitle: Mixed review, transformation, and final exam
description: Review advanced grammar categories, transform sentence structures, and complete the final M4 assessment.
